notes: Hit and Expertise caps are far and away the priority for Shield of the Righteous uptime; gem haste for the control build after that. Drops listed are 25 Heroic; Normal/Flex versions are the same items at lower item level. Draft compiled from Icy Veins MoP Classic guides.
